zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Beke於大約1255年出生在英國林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比時，她的父親Sir John de Beke Lord of Eresby33歲，母親Sarah de Furnival33歲。她和Richard de Harcourt至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1292年之前在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾馬可特 博斯沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: Beke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Flemish and Dutch: variant of   Beek  .
Hungarian (also Béke): most probably from a Hungarian form of the Turkish status name beg (see Beg ). Alternatively, it may be a pet form of a Hungarian personal name such as Benedek .

variants.name: Beek
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ernst, Johannes, Kurt, Otto.

Dutch and North German: topographic name for someone who lived by a stream or creek, beek (compare Bek 6), or a habitational name from any of various Dutch places called Beek (in Limburg, Gelderland, and North Brabant), named with the same word.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Beke was born about 1255, in Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, her father, Sir John de Beke Lord of Eresby, was 33 and her mother, Sarah de Furnival, was 33. She had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Richard de Harcourt. She died before 1292, in Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Beke est née environ 1255, à Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John de Beke Lord of Eresby, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Sarah de Furnival, avait 33 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Richard de Harcourt. Elle est décédée avant 1292, à Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Beke um 1255 in Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John de Beke Lord of Eresby 33 und ihre Mutter Sarah de Furnival 33. Sie hatte mit Richard de Harcourt mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb vor 1292 in Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Beke è nata il circa 1255 nel Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, Sir John de Beke Lord of Eresby, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Sarah de Furnival, aveva 33 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Richard de Harcourt. Morì prima del 1292, nel Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Bekeが約1255年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスパルスビーエレスビーで生まれた時，父Sir John de Beke Lord of Eresbyは33歳，母Sarah de Furnivalは33歳であった。彼女はRichard de Harcourtとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1292年以前にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアマーケト ボスウオルスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Beke(이)가 대략 1255년 영국 링코실르 스피스비 레스비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Beke Lord of Eresby(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah de Furnival(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 Richard de Harcourt(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1292년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 마크트 보스워스에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Beke родилась около 1255 г. в местности эресби, спилсби, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John de Beke Lord of Eresby было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Sarah de Furnival, 33. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Richard de Harcourt. Она умерла перед 1292 г. в местности маркет босворт, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.
